verses.text: Sanggamte aw, Masedonia gam pawpite-ah Pasian' hehpihna hangin a piang thute ka hong theisak nuam uh hi
Amaute in haksatna a tuamtuam phukha-in nakpi takin ze-etna thuakin, amaute zawng mahmah hita se le uh lungdam mahmah uh ahih manin piakna lamsangah cingh thei mahmah uh hi
Amaute in amau ngahna tawh kituak bekin a pia hiloin, a piak zawhzah dingun a kilawm sangin a tamzaw a piakna uh ka thei taktak uh hi. Kuama sawl hiloin amau lungsimah a uttawmna uh tawh
Judea gama Pasian mite, ko zong hong huh sak un, ci-in hong thumthum uh hi
Hih bangin a gamtatna uh kote' lamet sangin sangzaw pek hi. Amaute pen Topa tungah kipia masa uh a, tua ciangin Pasian' deihna bangin kote tungah zong a hong kipia uh ahi hi
Tua mah bangin Titus in zong hih bang nasepna ding hong pat khit ahih mah bangin midang huhna ding na sepnate uh note lakah hong zawhpih vet dingin ka hanthawn uh hi

Note pen thu upna, thugenna, thutheihna, midang huhding lawpna, leh kote nong itna uha kipanin na khempeuhah midang sangin ginazaw na hih mah bangun midang huhna ding hih nasepna-ah zong na cingh mahmah ta un
Hih bang ka hong gen ciangin thupiakna tawh a hong gen hiloin, midangte in tua zahin mi huhna ding kin ahih leh note in zong midang na itna uh bangzah taktak ahi hiam, ci-in ka theihnopna ahi hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh i Topa Jesuh zong hau mahmah napi-in ama zawn'na tawh note mihau na suahtheihna dingun note' hangin mizawngin hong kibawl ahih manin i Topa Jesuh Khrih hong itna bangzah takin lian hiam, cih thu na thei uh hi
Hih thu tawh kisai-in keima ngaihsutna panin: Note in ni kumin hih bang nasep ding utna lungsim a nei bek hiloin a pankhia masate na hih uh mah bangin na tangtut ding uh hoihpen hi
Tua ahih manin na patsa uh thu a bei dongin zomsuak un la, na gelsa uh na tangtun'sak theihna dingun na neihsa uh tawh lawptakin na sem un
Piaknopna lungsim na neih nak uh leh na neihlohnate uh siksan hiloin na neihna uh tawh kizui-in na piak uh Pasian in hong sang ding hi
Hih bangin ka hong gen ciangin midangte in noptuamna a ngahna dingin note in haksapi-in tuam gimpih ding ka cihna hilo hi

Tu laitakin note cithei na hih manun amau cihmawhnate-ah huh le uh cin, note in haksat na tuah hun uh ciangin zong amaute in hong huh ding uh ahih manin note khatlekhat na kihuh diamdiam ding uh ka deihna ahi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Lai Siangtho in zong, “An tampi a lapa in an haulua tuanlo a, tawmno a lapa zong zawnglua tuanlo hi,” na ci hi.
Kote' hong kin zahin Titus in note hong kinna dingin Pasian in lungsim guan' ahih manin Pasian tungah ka nuam mahmah uh hi
Amah in kote hong sawlna a hong mang ciang bek hiloin, amah in note huhnopna lungsim neitawm ahih manin note kiangah pai ding hong ngaihsun hi
Lungdamna thuhilh nasepna-ah pawlpi khempeuh in a zahtak mahmah, thu upna sungah ka sanggampa uh tawh zong ka hong kithuahsak uh hi

Tua thamloin, Pasian' minthan'na ding leh midangte ka huhnopna uh a kilatna dingin hih bangin mi huhna ding vaihawmin ka khualzinna peuh uhah a hong zui dingin pawlpite in teelin a sehpa uh zong ahi hi
Citna tawh mi huhna dingin a kipia hih sum ka zekna uh tawh kisai-in mi a phunkhak lohna dingun a kidawm mahmah ka hi uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' hoihsak ding bek hiloin mite in zong hoih a sakding bangin na a semnuam ka hi uh hi

Amaute gel tawh hong kithuah dingin thu upna sungah ka sanggam uh adang khat tawh zong ka hong tonsak uh hi. Amah pen na khempeuhah thuman mahmah hi, ci-in ka theih khitsa uh hi a, note hong muan' mahmahna hangin note hong huh ding a lawpna khang semsem hi
Titus ahih leh note-a' ding ka nasepna-ah ka kikholhpih ka naseppih mi hi a, amah tawh hong kithuah ka sanggamte gel uh ahih leh pawlpite' tang hi uh a, Khrih' min a thangsakte ahi uh hi
Tua ahih manin note ka hong kisialhpihna uhah a kisial khial ka suahlohna ding uh leh pawlpi khempeuh in a theihtelna dingun hih ka sanggamte uh limtakin na limbawl un.
